name: telecommunications_defense_stonehaven_tru_loy
premise: A satellite backhaul partner is throttling humanitarian SIMs; PR wants a statement before journalists compare rate tables. In Telecommunications, the situation tagged internally around telecommunications defense stonehaven tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A vendor bridge ends at forty-five minutes; after that, configuration changes require a full change-advisory board. Framing has already hardened externally as truth against loyalty; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Hector Okoye
agents.identity: I am Hector Okoye, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Telecommunications. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Leila Dubois
agents.identity: I am Leila Dubois, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Telecommunications. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on loyalty.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on loyalty for immediate traction on truth.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Hector Okoye must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Hector Okoye do?
